#Talk 1
Fusion and dbt News by Álvaro Martin, Solution Architect @ dbt
Get the latest product and roadmap updates from dbt and hear experiences from global users of Fusion and more.

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks are given by different members of the community, who share their experience on topics ranging from analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

This event is limited to 80 people, so please only RSVP if you intend to come and reach out to hosts via email (ronyekwe@spauldingridge.com) if you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup page to "Not Going."

📣 Agenda and additional details below:

6:00pm Check in/Registration

7:20 - 7:50 Talk #2 + Q&A
7:50 - 8:00 Final panel questions & Closing remarks
8:00 - 9:00pm Reception & Networking (socializing, light food and refreshments 🍷 🍺 🧀 ☕ 🥤)

✨ Speaker Lineup✨

#Talk 1
Golden Spaghetti
Afonso Moreira - Head of Data and Co-CEO @ Lovys

Refactoring our data warehouse from a legacy system with spaghetti-like model relationships into a medallion architecture, we implemented model labelling for improved finops. This allowed us to optimise queries, eliminate redundancies, and deliver faster results with greater team efficiency, providing more value to internal users.

#Talk 2
Practical tips & use cases for unlocking self-service with dbt, Omni, and AI
Jon Palmer - Managing Architect @ Omni Analytics | Ex-King, Scopely, GoCardless

Learn best practices and real-world examples for combining dbt, SDLC workflows, AI, and BI to improve analytical accuracy and deliver reliable, conversational insights. This session shows how aligning these tools and methods strengthens data lineage, automates documentation, and empowers true self-service.

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

This is a special edition meetup sponsored by dbt Labs, so come to learn, ask questions and discover best practices (applicable to core and cloud!). Talks are given by different members of the community, who share their experience on topics ranging from analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

7:15 - 7:45 Talk #2 + Q&A

✨ Speaker Lineup✨

##### Data Modernization at international jewelry brand Tous: Migrating to cloud

##### by Xavier Martin Ferrer, head of Data @ Tous

Discover how dbt helped Tous to transform siloed data from SAP (sales and stocks) and their CRM into a data model accessible by teams across the organization.

##### Should we build this in Looker or dbt?

##### by Sarah Levy, Co-Founder & CEO @ Euno

Despite dbt's game changing impact on data modeling, issues like misused documentation, duplicate metrics, and siloed logic continue to hinder a unified source of truth. This talk proposes a 'reverse flow' approach, automating the integration of business logic crafted by analysts within Looker into dbt, and answering: When do data teams use Looker and when do they use dbt? What are 3 overlooked challenges of scaling dbt when most analysts use Looker? What's the best way to govern business logic with Looker and DBT?

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: Ironhack, Campus Ironhack Barcelona @ Carrer Pamplona, 96, 08018 - Barcelona
🍕Catering: TBA
🤝Community Organizers: Alejo Buxeres, Guillaume Legoy, Sergi Gómez
⏰ Time: 6:30pm - 9:00pm

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

***
📣 Agenda and additional details below:

6:30pm Check in/Registration
7:00 Welcome Remarks
7:05-7:30 Talk #1 + Q&A
7:30-7:55 Talk #2 + Q&A
7:55-8:00pm Closing remarks
8:00-9:00 Reception & Networking (socializing, light food and refreshments 🍷 🍺 🧀 ☕ 🥤)

✨ Speaker Lineup✨
🗣 Patricio Villanueva, Data Analyst at Landbot
Landbot's data pipeline from fivetran, passing from dbt and how we monitor errors and our failures rates
This talk will cover different solutions that the team contemplated for their data pipeline from the data ingestion (airflow, fivetran, stitch), their experience using dbt (test, CI, macros) and how they monitor pipelines.

🗣 Eduardo Varas, Data Analytics Engineer at Spaulding Ridge
From BI managed aggregations to Star data model in dbt
Heygo provides live, interactive touristic tours across the world. This dbt project is the pillar of Heygo's data stack for Analytics purposes, based on Fivetran, Snowflake and Looker. This project attempted to migrate from a complex aggregation model within the BI platform to a more robust Star model for Heygo's analytics purpose.

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-barcelona channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).
----------------------------------
dbt is an open source command-line tool that speaks the preferred language of data analysts everywhere—SQL. With dbt, analysts take ownership of the entire analytics engineering workflow, from writing data transformation code to deployment and documentation.
Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

✨ Speaker Lineup✨

🗣 Nina Anderson, Technical Lead at Infinite Lambda
Carbon analytics with dbt
Understanding carbon emissions is currently only feasible for the largest companies and in a very limited way. I will argue why carbon analytics should be done in the modern data stack and given the same status as traditional BI. I will present the progress we've made towards building an open source tool at Infinite Lambda to help companies estimate their own carbon footprint using dbt and Snowflake.

🗣 Anna Julià, Product Data Analyst & Miguel Llorente, Senior Analytics Engineer at Wallbox
How to scale a dbt project at a scale level
At Wallbox we've been creating a data team and platform from scratch since more than a year ago. We're now 20 people and have hundreds of models in production. In this talk we'll share some of our challenges while scaling a dbt project. Topics include dbt core and marts, dbt orchestration with airflow, dbt alerting and monitoring and CI/CD.
